Name:
CD Mixtape
(Mona Lisa)
Notes:
(07/11/2013) (X plans to release the first track off the mixtape)
(11/02/2014) (The first song off of XXX UNMASTERED is released)
Quality: The CD Mixtape is X’s earliest known project, being developed in early 2013 and allegedly being released on X’s Facebook mid 2013, and being uploaded to CD’s. This tape was frequently talked about on X’s Twitter by X and his older friend, J $oul. The tape supposedly featured around 10-12 tracks on it, The tape is boom bap based, featuring X rapping with 90s influence and a hint of Jamaican.

XXX (UNMASTERED)
(XXX *unfinished*)
Notes:
(11/02/2014) (The first song off of XXX UNMASTERED is released)
(06/03/2014) (The final track for XXX UNMASTERED is released)
Quality: X’s debut mixtape, XXX mainly consisted of his earlier songs from 2013 and 2014 on SoundCloud. “Vice City,” “al.one,” “M011Y,” “DEAD” and “THE END IS NIGH” were supposedly on the project but he ended up putting other songs he made instead. It has since been privated and a lot of songs were lost, but "Vice City”, X’s oldest public song on his SoundCloud to this day, survived. More than half of the mixtape is leaked. The full version can’t be found anywhere on the Internet.

Name: Ice Hotel
Quality: XXXTENTACION’s second EP Ice Hotel, highlights some of his rarer material that is unavailable to most of the general public. Like most of his early tracks, it was said to have been deleted from SoundCloud for an unknown reason that X never revealed. but it was later discovered that the EP was privated. Ranging from somber tracks such as “0C3AN” and “Ice Hotel” to ominous ones such as “FUCK V2” and “sounds of the melting pot”, X’s versatility can be noted throughout the 8-track EP.

Name: THE NOBODYS
Quality: Often mistaken to be a collaborative project between X, Ski Mask, and producer YXXXNZ, "THE NOBODYS" mixtape was released in July 2014 before being updated once. The only confirmed tracks are uploads with the tape's cover and title being used on the songs' cover arts and descriptions. Later mentions of "THE NOBODYS" most likely refer to x, ski, and yan as a collective rather than a project.
